title: arabis pendulina var. russeola
intro: Arabis pendulina var. russeola, also known as Russian rockcress, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of glucosinolates and isothiocyanates. The plant is rich in antioxidants, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function. Arabis pendulina var. russeola can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and as a diuretic.
